name: xsxb-frame-tuner
description: Standalone webapp and Codex skill for tuning frame-based Godot character animations.

scripts.check: node --check tools/animation_tuner/server.js && node --check tools/animation_tuner/public/app.js && node --check tools/import_frames.js && node --check tools/import_spriteframes.js && node --check tools/godot_sync.js && node --check tools/godot_runtime.js
